Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Regarding Cross Complaint For Partnership Accounting (Ccp438, 343 And 339(1))
Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jerome Garchik, Esq. (415-495-8527) for Plaintiff/Moving party BRUCE KRELL and PAMELA KRELL.
Eric Miller, Esq.(415-485-2200) for Defendant/opposing party Patricia Ann Hunter.

The Court announces the Tentative ruling for the 3 motions on calendar and the reasons behind them. The Motion for leave to file first amended Cross-Complaint is Denied, there is no compliance. The Motion for Appointment of appraiser is premature, no motion in front of the Court re what particular time the Appraiser is supposed to use. The Motion for Judgment on the pleadings is Denied, the Court concluded nothing in the SOL has barred anything. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BRUCE KRELL and PAMELA KRELL's Amended Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Regarding Cross Complaint For Partnership Accounting (Ccp438, 343 And 339(1))is taken under submission. Defendant submits a proposed order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
